prompt_used: Create original premium horror artwork for a commercial alternate reality investigation game. Subject: clue artifact detail. Story world: The Fourth Tenant. Recurring motifs: door chains, wet plaster, rent slips. Create shard card for holder GLOBAL_BROADCAST. Content brief: Global drop contains watermark coordinates for the hidden hallway.. Ensure it can stand alone but becomes decisive when combined with other shards.. Subgenre: supernatural mystery. Tone: EERIE. Immediate scene brief: The Fourth Tenant - Lease Fragment Reconstruction - GLOBAL_BROADCAST Shard Card. Grounded cinematic horror, photoreal detail, rich atmosphere, practical lighting, believable materials, analog grain, subtle lens bloom, visible depth. No title treatment, no UI overlay, no case notes panel, no labels, no watermark, no logo, no poster typography, no debug text. Show a physical evidence-board or clue collage with photographs, string, maps, stained paper, and marked surfaces. Prioritize tactile realism over readable text. Any writing should be minimal, blurred, or partially obscured.
